summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Login feature. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - Admin badge, PRO badge, and LIVE MODE badge display correctly for admin users. Admin Login link appears in mobile menu with shield icon and navigates to /admin page. Normal users do NOT see Admin badge. Admin users see live data on /agents and /live-signals pages.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing users in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Login feature is fully functional. Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials returns role='admin', user_tier='elite', is_pro=true, is_elite=true. Normal users return role='user' without auto-elevation. Frontend: Admin badge (data-testid='admin-badge') and PRO badge (data-testid='pro-badge') appear in navigation for admin users. Admin Login link (data-testid='admin-login-mobile') appears in mobile hamburger menu with shield icon and navigates to /admin page. Admin users see LIVE data on /agents and /live-signals pages (no demo gating).

backend_api: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials returns role:admin - PASS
POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials returns user_tier:elite - PASS
POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials returns is_pro:true - PASS
POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials returns is_elite:true - PASS
POST /api/auth/login returns access_token and refresh_token - PASS
POST /api/auth/login with normal user returns role:user - PASS
POST /api/auth/login with normal user does NOT auto-elevate to elite - PASS
GET /api/auth/me with admin token returns admin role and elite tier - PASS
POST /api/auth/login with invalid password returns 401 - PASS
POST /api/auth/login with invalid email returns 401 - PASS
frontend_ui: Admin badge appears in navigation header when logged in as admin - PASS
PRO badge appears for admin users - PASS
LIVE MODE badge appears for admin users - PASS
Admin Login link appears in mobile hamburger menu with shield icon - PASS
Admin Login link navigates to /admin page - PASS
/agents page shows live agent performance for admin users (LIVE badge) - PASS
/live-signals page shows live signals for admin users (LIVE badge) - PASS
No demo components appear when admin is logged in - PASS
Normal user does NOT see Admin badge - PASS
Normal user sees PRO badge (if pro tier) - PASS
